notes: Generated reports are written to coverage/coverage.txt and coverage/coverage-summary.json.
The enforced Lune coverage scope is the deterministic core utility set used by CI.
Roblox-hosted UI components, themes, font download paths, and executor-specific integrations remain outside this Lune gate and require Studio/manual validation where changed.
auditGaps: src/components/*.luau: UI behavior is still primarily Roblox-hosted and should gain Studio/interaction tests as that harness matures.
src/themes/*.luau: theme data is not part of the current Lune coverage gate.
src/utility/fontManager.luau and src/utility/imageCache.luau: network, filesystem, and getcustomasset-heavy paths are not fully covered by deterministic unit tests.
executor-specific globals and public UI APIs still require manual compatibility validation when touched.
